intro: Verutum, also known as Verbena officinalis, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Verbenaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering various health benefits including anxiety and insomnia relief, improved digestion, and antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Verutum include verbascoside, aucubin, and verbena osmanthus, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Verutum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate stress, promote relaxation, and support overall well-being.
